title: Light Grilled Uruguayan Chicken Grill
description: A fresh and pillowy Uruguayan dish featuring arabic rice and grilled chicken, perfect for a brunch mood, served in a bento box.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Grill the chicken for 6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
While the chicken is cooking, prepare the arabic rice according to package instructions.
To assemble the dish, place a scoop of arabic rice in the bento box, followed by a few pieces of grilled chicken.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
